content.body: customer service is slow and does not provide any solution. They offer a very poor shipping service and pick up are extremely unreliable, I have some parcels that have never been picked up in 3 weeks despite multiple support requests and reschedule.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with slow customer service, unreliable shipping pickups, and unresolved issues with parcels not being picked up for weeks despite multiple support requests.

content.body: Outstanding customer service, great support, makes our business possible. I don't know if our company could function without it.

classification.summary: Possum Creek Games is highly satisfied with Saltbox's customer service and support, which they view as essential to their business operations.

content.body: I've found ShipStation to be very reliable and basically easy to use. I'm using it to ship orders from Shopify, Etsy, and Amazon, plus manual orders. I ship within the USA and internationally. ShipStation has tools that I haven't even used yet, so I know there are capabilities that I haven't explored. I have the most difficulty setting up the rules and automation to do exactly what I want, but I'm probably doing something wrong. ShipStation does save me time and it automates communication to customers. This software has made it easy to track down lost packages too.

classification.summary: The Cat Ball is satisfied with ShipStation's reliability and time-saving features but has minor difficulty with rules and automation setup.

content.body: We use ShipStation for all of our domestic shipping. I like that the interface has all the info we need, and it works well for batch processing. We use our own shipping rates (not ShipStation's).

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's interface and batch processing capabilities for domestic shipping and uses custom shipping rates.

content.body: We decided switch to ShipHero with the main goal of consolidating Inventory Management, Scan & Pack and Shipping into just one tool. We are very pleased with the results so far as ShipHero has positively impacted our productivity and inventory accuracy. With that said, The most value I have gotten from the switch has been their customer support, Mike was great getting us started during the onboarding process and Cathy is always there for us with outstanding support and availability. Thank you guys!

classification.summary: Starpil Wax switched to ShipHero to consolidate inventory management, scanning, packing, and shipping, and is satisfied with the improved productivity, inventory accuracy, and customer support.

content.body: Just tried to use and not allowed to purchase and print label, you've been taking monthly charges and the first time I try it , it failed

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated after being charged monthly fees but unable to use the service (label printing failed on first attempt), indicating they are ready to switch providers.

content.body: It works so awesomely for our business, It is amazing, simply amazing! It has helped us ramp up our shipping standards and speed. It also is great if you have barcodes, you can use the scan function for better accuracy.

classification.summary: The Sudsy Soapery is satisfied with Saltbox's fulfillment services, praising improved shipping speed and accuracy through barcode scanning functionality.

content.body:
It’s a great concept for 24 hour secured storage with loading docs. However, the Chatsworth warehouse is being poorly managed by Bella Gomez. Roll up doors are left open overnight, which makes security nonexistent. Trash bins are overflowing with trash which is embarrassing to meet with customers and clients.

I used two have two units and have chosen other businesses for my storage needs. The security deposit from the first unit took over a month to get back. Still waiting on a security deposit from the second unit for over 7 weeks. I would recommend hiring a new manager for Chatsworth location.

classification.summary: Customer switched away from Saltbox due to poor management at Chatsworth location, citing security issues, facility cleanliness, and delayed security deposit returns.

content.body: I've just started to use Easyship for my Shopify store. While I'm still new to it and figuring it out, the support has been great! I'm so glad that I have been able to set up support calls on the same day (in the same hour) and had my questions/issues resolved really quickly. Recommended, thanks!

classification.summary: User is satisfied with Easyship's fulfillment services and responsive customer support for their new Shopify store.

content.body: Fantastic! Loved using this app. It helps us coordinate seamlessly with our fullfilment team; taking a huge weight off of our shoulders.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Saltbox's fulfillment coordination capabilities and appreciates how it simplifies operations with their fulfillment team.

content.body: Public place for storage

classification.summary: Adrian Flores left a positive 5-star review about a storage facility in South Gate, California, indicating satisfaction with the public storage space.

content.body: Newbie to ShipStation. So far, so good. I'm loving it. Phenomenal App for my business site, www.CBDTroubleshoot.com. Very easy to use. Tracks shipping data, ect... Quick and easy. I recommend this app for your shipping and tracking needs.

classification.summary: A satisfied new ShipStation user praising the platform's ease of use and shipping tracking capabilities for their CBD ecommerce business.

content.body: Shopify and ShipStation work together beautifully for our application. The orders come in automatically from our Shopify store and the shipping effort is as as low as it can be. Literally a few minutes and your label is being printed and you're done. We are very happy with it. If there was any place that ShipStation could possibly be a little better is in shipments out of country (Canada mostly) but that's probably because we ship there infrequently and always seem to pick the "unavailable" UPS international instead of UPS Standard. Not a big deal though.

classification.summary: Customer is very satisfied with ShipStation's integration and speed but has minor friction with international shipping options to Canada.

content.body: Shipstation user of over 7 years and couldn't imagine doing business without them! Excellent customer service, and the platform offers tons of intuitive, useful capabilities that make everything run more smoothly!

classification.summary: Long-time ShipStation user praising the platform's customer service and intuitive features with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: I really love the functionality of the app. Very stable and an indispensable tool in my daily workflow.

classification.summary: MylarPacks.com is satisfied with their current app/tool functionality and stability in their workflow.

content.body: Love ShipStation. Its easy to use and keeps all my shipping data organized and easy to access.Quick and great customer service.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's ease of use, data organization, and customer service.

content.body: Overall great as it pulls in orders from many different stores / platforms. The inventory tracking doesn't seem to work, but otherwise great.

classification.summary: User is satisfied with multi-platform order integration but frustrated with inventory tracking functionality not working properly.

content.body: I use ShipBob fulfillment in two stores. The system is intuitive and updated. No hidden fees. And they always introducing new centers.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob customer praising their intuitive system, transparent pricing, and expansion of fulfillment centers.

content.body: We've been using EasyShip for a couple of months. Worldwide shipping is complicated, and they made it easy for us. Application is great for handling daily sales and fulfilling batch orders (i.e., Kickstarter campaigns). It has multiple functionalities we can't live without. To name a few:* Seamless, one-click integration with Shopify (you can add many stores)* Shipping at Checkout (your customer can choose a courier, and the shipping cost is accurate). It works worldwide!* Insurance* Shipping rules (a great tool to automate shipping scenarios for different locations or box sizes)* Product listing * Simple import from file (excellent for batch orders - you can import any CSV file, and EasyShip support many e-commerce platforms * Customizable notification emails to customers In addition, EasyShip provides excellent customer and technical support (helps with couriers, customers, and the application). We highly recommend this application and other EasyShip services.

classification.summary: Luxonis is a satisfied EasyShip customer praising the platform's shipping automation, integrations, and customer support capabilities.

content.body: We've had an amazing experience with EasyShip! Our Account Manager is super responsive, and the platform is easy to use for both Ops, Warehouse, and Customer Support team members. Reporting has improved so much since January when we onboarded. Would highly recommend.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising EasyShip's responsive account management, user-friendly platform, and improved reporting capabilities.

content.body: Shipstation is great. It provides all sorts of ways to help us organize our workflow in our retail small business. We do lots of pre-orders, local pickup, and have many different staff with hands on our product. Being able to tag orders and comment within the program drastically helps our workflow. The ability to connect a scale directly to the software and weigh items is key. Plus, we can compare different carrier rates instantaneously to determine the lowest cost. With the ability to scan/verify orders via Shopify barcodes to the easy interface and ability to sort to their guaranteed best rates (I've compared), Shipstation provides the best and most robust shipping software out there.

classification.summary: Customer is praising Shipstation's shipping software capabilities for organizing workflow, managing orders, and comparing carrier rates, with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: Works great! You can ship first class if you need to which you can't do on other platforms. Makes shipping large amounts of orders daily much more efficient.

classification.summary: Customer praising Saltbox's shipping flexibility and efficiency for handling large daily order volumes compared to other platforms.

content.body: Cette application est très bonne! Les clients peuvent voir l'estimation des frais douaniers au passage à la caisse, ce qui les informent adéquatement des frais. De plus, ce qui est vraiment bien, c'est qu'ils peuvent payer ces frais directement avec l'achat du produit en choisissant certains transporteurs comme DHL. De plus, on peut acheter des étiquettes d'expédition pour des ventes d'autres plateformes de ventes, comme Etsy, Amazon, eBay, ce qui est très pratique. Très Très bon service client.

classification.summary: A satisfied Canadian customer praising a shipping/customs estimation app for its transparency, payment flexibility, multi-platform label purchasing, and excellent customer service.

content.body: incredible app! Makes so many shipping hassles completely effortless and the staff is ALWAYS SO helpful. Couldnt recommend it more! Truly makes running the day to day in my business so much easier.

classification.summary: A satisfied existing customer praising the app and staff for streamlining their shipping and business operations.

content.body: We've been using ShipStation for several years and the integration with Shopify is seamless. The app has robust features that scale easily based off the size of your business. It is easy to comparing shipping rates for companies like USPS, FedEx, DHL and UPS. The automation tools are robust and allow for ease when customizing a specific workflow down the employee level. After 6 years of using this product our only complaint is that users are still not able to automate package sets on shipments with multiple packages.

classification.summary: Long-time ShipStation user satisfied with the platform overall but frustrated by the inability to automate package sets for multi-package shipments.

content.body: I've used several shipping softwares and none of them have had as many features and customization as ShipHero. While we do run into some glitches here and there, it's because they are constantly working to improve the software. They are quick to resolve any issues and really listen to feature requests. The connection to Shopify is incredibly quick and accurate. This software has vastly improved our inventory management and fulfillment. The care that went into our onboarding process can't be beat. Our onboarding specialist made sure we were able to transition our processes as seamlessly as possible and helped tailor the system to our shipping requirements. Thank you Mike & ShipHero!

classification.summary: Holy Grail Steak Co. is praising ShipHero's shipping software features, customization, and onboarding support, indicating satisfaction with their current fulfillment solution.

content.body: We have been using Easyship for over 6 months and it is by far the best shipping app we have ever used! And trust me, we have worked with over 7 major shipping services now to try and find the right fit for our business! There are many reasons we have finally found our home with Easyship, but first and foremost the user interface is beautiful and functional, and the customer service is amazing! We love the integrated shopping cart with customized carrier options for every customer, the ability to offer shipping insurance, and the focus on international carrier options. In the backend, we love that we can ship in bulk, while easily changing weight or label options for an individual order without leaving the page. It is also incredibly easy to create custom shipping rules, and the filtering options are almost unlimited! Hands down, this is the best shipping app we have ever used! :)

classification.summary: A satisfied customer praising their current shipping solution (Easyship) and explaining why it works well for their business.

content.body: We've been using Shipstation for 3 years, shipping around 1000-1500 packages per year. The switch to Shipstation from manual shipping through the USPS was a quantum leap forward in efficiency. We couldn't run our business without Shipstation. Shipstation is perfect in nearly every regard except one: they aren't integrated fully with their parent company, Stamps.com. USPS international shipping options are not named the same in Stamps.com and Shipstation, which leads to confusion. I spent a few hours working with Shipstation user support to deal with the situation and it still wasn't resolved. I wish that Shipstation would change their shipping options to match the names that are officially used by USPS and Stamps.com. It's still not clear to me if Shipstation is permitting me to purchase all of the shipping options offered through my Stamps.com account (which was set up through Shipstation).

classification.summary: Long-time Shipstation user appreciates the platform but frustrated with incomplete integration between Shipstation and parent company Stamps.com regarding USPS international shipping option naming and clarity.

content.body: ShipStation is awesome, it's made a huge impact in the efficiency of our fulfillment. We use it with multiple sales channels, not just shopify, and have been very happy. The only reason for 4 stars (instead of 5) is because I couldn't find an easy way to feed live rates from Shipstation to our Shopify store based on dimensions and weight. Maybe I missed it somewhere, but we'd like customers to just pay actual shipping costs and instead we have estimates based on size/weight buckets.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's fulfillment efficiency but frustrated by the inability to integrate live shipping rates into their Shopify store based on dimensions and weight.

content.body: We use ShipStation along with Shopify for shipping of our online orders. The integration is seamless and it's easy to compare shipping rates for different shipping partners like USPS, FedEx, UPS, etc. to find the most economical option or quickest delivery time. The labels are easy to print and the tracking numbers are helpful when we need to follow a package thru the delivery system. Even adding more postage to our online account is a breeze. If I could suggest anything, it would be to offer a subscription level between the 50 and 500 shipments per month level as we often exceed 50, but don't come anywhere near 500 per month.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation but requests an intermediate subscription tier between 50-500 monthly shipments to better match their volume.

content.body: I originally reviewed this store in April 2021. It's now August 2021. My experience has been consistent in the 2+ years I've been using the app. It's integration with Shopify is seamless, as is its integration with Ebay. As noted previously, it's easy to compare shipping options/prices, and integration with shipping accounts is easy. Works equally well with domestic and international shipping. When needed, customer service is quick and professional. Based on marketing emails and recommendations from various business-related sites, I've looked into other companies providing similar services, but I haven't seen any that provide services or lower costs that would justify making the change.

classification.summary: Satisfied long-term customer praising seamless integrations, competitive pricing, and reliable service with no incentive to switch providers.

content.body: ShipHero has been an excellent next step for us as our company rapidly grows. Most notably, the customer service they provide is top-notch. Brett Oliveira, Mike Azimi, and Cathy Galvis all were fast to respond and incredibly helpful throughout the whole process. Migrating to this app was a big task and they made it easy and painless! Even after just a few weeks, we're already starting to see huge benefits from using ShipHero and are looking forward to growing even more with ShipHero's help!

classification.summary: DFTBA is a satisfied ShipHero customer praising their service quality and migration support as they scale their ecommerce business.

content.body: ShipHero has been an integral service in supporting our brand to bring shipping back in-house. The onboarding process was straightforward and helpful. Our representative Mike Azimi is an incredible person with wonderful energy, and he guided us through the process and answered the many questions that we had. We also had the opportunity to meet Mike for an in-person training where he helped our team get up and running with the entire shipping process. After just a few weeks navigating inventory counts and bulk uploads, we’re seeing huge benefits from ShipHero and we’re on-track with our shipments processing smoothly. Big thanks to Mike and the ShipHero team for all the amazing support!

classification.summary: A satisfied customer is praising ShipHero's onboarding, support, and service quality after successfully bringing their shipping in-house and scaling their fulfillment operations.

content.body: During the pandemic, our business had to quickly shift to online sales by adding several Shopify Shops. We started using ShipStation from the beginning and it's been a great decision. We've been able to personalize the shipping experience from our multiple Shops through ShipStation, It's also helped us choose the most efficient shipping mode and save money on our shipping spend. We also utilize ShipStation for our returns program by sending shipping labels for RMA requests. I would highly recommend ShipStation for others looking for shipping options for Shopify Shops.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's ability to personalize shipping across multiple Shopify shops and reduce shipping costs, and recommends it to others.

content.body: My store is based in the UK and I have just invested a few hours, with the help of Joe from Easyship, to integrate it into my website. Firstly the help was second to none, thank you Joe! The early results are looking good and I'm just waiting on the right details to integrate my own carriers. I feel this will give my customers a better choice of carrier, and hopefully reduce my abandon cart rates. *** Updated - Joe disappeared and I now find the shipping rules inadequate to filter out simple needs. There also seems no way to deal with the new EU IOSS tax system.

classification.summary: UK-based store frustrated with Easyship's inadequate shipping rules, poor support responsiveness, and lack of EU IOSS tax system integration despite initial positive setup experience.

content.body: ShipStation has saved me HOURS a week in manual shipping entries. The automation rules alone have been tremendously helpful and the ability to customize labels is an added bonus. Great customer support, I'll be a happy customer for as long as I own an ecommerce business.

classification.summary: Happy ShipStation customer praising automation, customization features, and support with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: I started using shipstation about 3-4 years ago and love the integration between shopify and shipstation. You can do stand alone shipments through shipstation; as well as shipstation can give you reports on cost of shipping between any storefront used. This is my go to program and shipping rates are great and the best deals possible on ups when I can ship a package for $10 compared to $16 on other programs. Highly recommended for sure!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipStation user praising the platform's Shopify integration, shipping cost savings, and reporting capabilities.

content.body: Stamps.com owns Shipstation and likes to make a sizeable margin on the USPS Priority Mail labels they offer through Shipstation. Do your own comparisons on rates for your shipping needs before settling on any label and shipping solution for your business -- we realized that the full cubic rates that are available to us through Shopify or Shippo are always much less expensive than what Shipstation/Stamps.com is willing to provide to small businesses that do not quality for a bulk high-volume direct contract with USPS. Likewise the UPS Air and Ground rates that were offered to us with our own UPS account through Shipstation were always significantly more than the same UPS rates available to us through Shopify or Shippo. The Shipstation UI, bulk order processing and printing, the ability to print to a remote printer with Shipstation Connect, and the customer self-service returns portal were all decent and useful over the eight years we were a Shipstation customer. There is even a smartphone app for on-the-go order processing.

classification.summary: Company switched away from Shipstation due to significantly higher shipping rates compared to alternatives like Shopify and Shippo, despite appreciating the platform's features.

content.body: App works perfectly for our needs. We have been using Shopify for years. We specifically like the item view, where you can see a thumbnail of what the customer ordered. We also like the feature that allows you to see if this is a new customer or a repeat buyer. They are attentive to customer issues, have very little down time and over all it is the best out there- (we have looked)

classification.summary: A satisfied long-time Shopify user praising their current app/platform's features and reliability with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: I like using Shipstation as standalone software but this app is just not cutting it. It's incredibly buggy and inconsistent in the rates its showing. It's super frustrating as a merchant to not be able to offer consistant and reliable live rates to our customers. Customer service is incredibly difficult to get.

classification.summary: Merchant is frustrated with Shipstation app's buggy performance, inconsistent shipping rates, and poor customer service, but hasn't indicated they're actively switching yet.

content.body: Easyship has some of the best customer service I have experienced. To illustrate, we once had the problem that we had to manually add the shipping details for our shipments from Easyship into the shopify order. After telling our customer success manager about this they programmed a solution for us within two weeks free of charge that solved the problem. They have proven to always be this responsive, no matter what the request is, and this is what makes Easyship worth the slightly higher price than for example Amazon, who would never bother to do anything with your request. It truly seems that Easyship want your business to succeed. They have also helped us in establishing a new warehouse, and resolved problems with our couriers. Would definetly recommend them to anyone looking for someone who actually does something with your requests for help. Easyship feels more like a partner than a service.

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer is praising their responsive customer service and partnership approach, comparing them favorably to competitors like Amazon.

content.body: We have been using Easyship for several years and the experience has been very good. Essentially the app allows any business or person to connect with their large network of couriers, both local and international - allowing one to send packages internationally at reasonable rates. The app is well designed and easy to use. Love how seamlessly it syncs up with Shopify, customers can see the many shipping options at checkout, delivery lead time, estimated taxes/customs incurred - everything is presented succinctly. For a business, this app has been instrumental in connecting us to the rest of the world. The app continues to work on bringing added features and it is also worth to mention the tremendous customisable options on the app. Customer service has been quite prompt, more importantly our Customer Success Manager, Calvin, has been stellar and goes above and beyond to provide support and care. His genuine care for his clients definitely gives us greater confidence in the app and its services moving forward. Highly recommended!

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer in Singapore is praising the platform's international shipping capabilities, Shopify integration, and customer support, with no indication of switching services.

content.body: I can't imagine doing business without ShipBob. I recommend them to everyone I meet in the eCommerce industry. The customer service is incredible, even though I rarely need it. I go weeks without even checking to see if everything is shipping properly as I've had so few issues. ShipBob is the best!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is praising their service quality and reliability, indicating no current need to switch providers.

content.body: Ship Bob does a good job for us. The interface is pretty easy to use and they ship on time. I would recommend them

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's user interface, on-time shipping, and overall service quality.

content.body: We started using this app and it seemed great interface wise. The canadian courier prices were pretty high so it wasnt giving us the lowest rates, shopify shipping was still cheaper even though it states we get discounted rates. I've been trying to add our custom Canada post courier account, and its been like pulling teeth, the support team keeps giving me the run around.. and literally in the middle of a live chat session the support person said they had to run to a meeting and ended the chat.. so unprofessional.. what a waste. The platform is good but that is easily the worst support Ive come across and I have seen some bad ones.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with a shipping/logistics app's high courier rates and poor customer support, though they acknowledge the platform interface is good.

content.body: Good platform and worked perfectly. Provide worldwide shipping without worrying about wrong shipping fee to our end or buyer. Customer support has been excellent in provide assist and fast response.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's platform, worldwide shipping capabilities, and responsive customer support.

content.body: ShipMonk has been a really great partner with excellent customer service. Like everywhere, last year with the pandemic and then a blow out November/December, and then lingering effects of COVID-19 there were several unavoidable issues and delays but it is very clear ShipMonk had the leadership and strategy on how to come out of it and put in a lot of new tactics to make sure they are in a better position next year. They are continually improving and making things better which is something important with any partner. We recommend them!

classification.summary: Dang Foods is satisfied with ShipMonk's service and leadership despite pandemic-related delays, and recommends them as a partner.

content.body: My orders are totally automatic. Everytime I get a new order on my Shopify website the order is automatically fulfilled. Customer service on ShipBob is solid too. I don't have to wade through the endless amounts of complex, confusing steps and flaky cryptic customer service like with Amazon! I'm so relieved I don't have to have store my products and ship them out manually. Plus, when I do get an order from a customer on Amazon FBM (fulfillment by merchant) I have ShipBob do the fulfillment as well. Your customer, most likely, wont receive your product as quickly as Amazon, but it's really nice having my products with ShipBob where I can easily access it and be able to have a ShipBob rep help with all things fulfillment.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their automatic order fulfillment and customer service compared to Amazon FBM, though acknowledging slower delivery times than Amazon.

content.body: Love the customer service and the amount of support I received during my onboarding process! I'm anxiety-prone especially when it comes to getting started with something new and ShipMonk has been a great help...plus good vibes all around! The software is easy to use as well and has everything I need.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising ShipMonk's onboarding support and user-friendly software with no apparent switching intent.

content.body: Horrible experience... Stay far away! Initially, they (Erik van Bilderbeek, Jennifer Santanna & Kerry Neysmith) promised us they can do everything we asked. We sent 50% of our inventory to them. Only to find out after they received our products that their system doesn't allow them to do so. Before launching we placed test orders to ourselves to see if Shipmonk can fulfill correctly and each time they made unacceptable mistakes. We sell underwear and they literally had measured some of our underwear products with a 7 inch height. Actual height is about 0.3". Shipmonk also weighed our products incorrectly adding a 1 pound 8 ounces weight for an underwear. Actual weight is 0.2 lbs. These measurements and weights were mistakes after our complaints getting their manager, Kerry, involved and re-measuring everything. How can they be so off? How can they be so negligent!? After 3 months of consistent issues after issues we just couldn't continue with them. 3 months of time lost. Thousands of dollars lost with Shipmonk even though all the issues were clearly theirs. They do not own up to their own mistakes. We ended up having to pay for their negligence. Highly Not Recommended! Stay Far Away! Find Another Fulfillment Center!

classification.summary: WAMA Underwear is actively seeking to leave ShipMonk due to severe fulfillment errors, poor accountability, and significant financial losses over a 3-month period.

content.body: This was the first 3PL we have partnered with. We initially chose to work with ShipMonk because of their experience and infrastructure with Shopify and their ability to deal with mass quantities of orders. Their onboarding process was simple and a straightforward plug-in through the app store. The App interface is very well made and has some great resources for training purposes. We worked with Kerry who has gone above and beyond in communication and transparency. Their whole team of Happiness Engineers is a major highlight of our experience. On the ground their operations exceeded our expectations. We had 5 figures in order quantity, and they maintained an error margin of around .01%. All orders were fulfilled within 2-5 days keeping our customers extremely happy. Some minor things that we would like to see improved on:Accurate up-to-date inventory counts after fulfilled orders.A more straightforward "assisted" claim process for orders with errors. Even more visibility into the receiving process.Quicker updates to billing cycle and pricing changes. Overall, we would recommend to any company who is looking for custom fulfillment specialists. Just be clear to set expectations early, and ShipMonk will deliver.

classification.summary: A Ma Maniere is satisfied with ShipMonk's fulfillment services but identifies minor areas for improvement including inventory accuracy, claims processes, visibility, and billing transparency.

content.body: I'm still finding bugs on a weekly basis. Plus, whenever they push down an update, there's no notification. You never know when a new version is going to overwrite the old (it's web based). Nor is there anywhere you can go and find out what the latest bug fixes were. Using it is a big productivity boost, but it's simply unreliable. You don't dare print out more than 10 labels at a time, and you'd better count them as they print, to make sure none are skipped. Their current bug, is their integration with Amazon FBA. Shipstation simply refuses to see my FBA inventory accurately, resulting in me either submitting orders to Amazon FBA when there is no stock, or Shipstation will tell me that FBA has no stock, when indeed they do. They have a slick product, but they simply have very poor quality control in place, for the software updates. June 28/2021Well, here we are about a year later....Shipstation no long has the issue of printing incorrect label counts. Seems they fixed that. However, they still don't have a handle on the FBA integration. SS still reports your FBA quantities wrong, and SS also reports the FBA postage fee wrong (but only sometimes).

classification.summary: ShipStation user frustrated with frequent bugs, poor quality control on updates, and persistent FBA inventory integration issues that impact order accuracy.

content.body: Shipstation is great for keeping orders from many stores in one place. Great customer service too, very responsive!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipStation's ability to consolidate orders from multiple stores and its responsive customer service.

content.body: Easyship is quite a good platform as we can ship to plenty of countries worldwide without worrying about no shipping solution to destination country. Customer support has some major improvement over the years in terms of response speed. The only things that need to work on is that there aren't sufficient courier to handle shipment contained battery.

classification.summary: User praises Easyship's global shipping capabilities and improved customer support but notes insufficient courier options for battery-containing shipments.

content.body: We love using ShipMonk their customer service is the best and with dedicated "happiness engineers" there are real people that can help solve fullfillment issues. They are an extention of our customer service and we appreciate their quick response times and attention to detail.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's fulfillment services and customer support quality, indicating satisfaction with their current provider.

content.body: Great manager she's on top of it

classification.summary: Customer praising management quality at their current fulfillment provider.

content.body: We find tremendous value in using ShipStation. We used to create shipping labels through our carrier web portals and it was very time-consuming entering information from the orders. We save countless hours using ShipStation. The integration is seamless and customizable as well.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's time-saving integration and customization capabilities for managing shipments, but is not expressing interest in switching fulfillment providers.

content.body: ShipStation is easy to integrate and use with Shopify. In the past year and a half it has saved us hundreds of work hours for our small team allowing us to focus on other aspects to continue growing our business. I cannot imagine doing an online retail business without using ShipStation anymore.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipStation user praising the platform's integration with Shopify and time-saving benefits for their small ecommerce business.

content.body: I absolutely love ShipMonk! Their seamless integration with the Shopify cart is what led me to them. From my first call to ask questions about the service, to the onboarding process these guys made me feel like I had a team working with me to get my product up on the market. My Fulfillment Consultant Brandon was there every step of the way to answer my questions even the stupid ones. Not once was I pushed off to an FAQ or a link to go find the answers on my own. ShipMonk is not just a fulfillment house; they are an addition to your business team. So if you're on the fence and searching through reviews to make sure you're making the right decision like I was, trust these are the guys you've been looking for.

content.body: Shipbob has been a great partner since we joined them a year ago. They literally saved us from a disastrous situation with a different 3PL group (I won't name names, but "RH" should give you a hint). Their support is great and quick to respond. The rates are fair. I particularly enjoy the "all-in" pricing model. And their growing network of warehouse locations, especially internationally, is really helping us to seamlessly expand our overseas operations. I would give 4.5 stars if I could. My main criticism has to do with the Shopify integration, specifically the warehouse locations. Currently, the integration is set up where ShipBob acts as the fulfillment service and does not support multiple warehouse locations. So whether you have 1 Shipbob location, 4 Shipbob locations, or multiple locations between Shipbob and other providers (we sometimes ship from our headquarters, for example), Shopify groups it all into one and really limits what you can see and do in Shopify. I've been told this is being addressed, so really looking forward to seeing this improved.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob customer praising their service overall but frustrated with Shopify integration limitations around multiple warehouse location visibility and control.

content.body: Wouldn't Have Made over $3,000,000 Last Year Without Shipmonk! This software has expedited the SALES GROWTH of my business by removing the headache of shipping, storing, and hiring staff to package and process orders. With this weight off of my shoulders, I can 100% focus on new product development and effective marketing to continue increasing my business' revenue. The thing I LEAST LIKE about this software is that I didn't know it existed YEARS before! I have been using this software since the summer of 2018. Before that, I was STRUGGLING to keep up with packaging hundreds of monthly orders. Fast forwards years later, we now have THOUSANDS of orders each month. Image if I was still self-packaging my own orders with our current volume. This software is a MUST HAVE for serious business owners that want to build a business that can fully operate on its own. Overall, this software is CRITICAL because it frees my time, gives me location independence to travel, and enjoy my family without worrying about packaging material, processing orders, or interacting with shipping companies. This software gives me the security and confidence knowing that I am building a sustainable business that can and does run without me needing to be present for every aspect.

content.body: We use ShipBob for order fulfillment. They are a self service fulfillment operation, so as long as you feel comfortable navigating these waters with minimal support, I'd recommend them. However, after you reach a certain volume and $$ threshold, you get dedicated support. We've found the dedicated support very helpful. They just started offering 2-day delivery in the lower 48 states, so that was a big plus. We were considering using Deliverrr for the 2-day option, but they started offering this option before we made the switch. Sometimes standard shipping options are extremely delayed or never show up, (they use UPS mail innovations or DHL surepost for their standard options) but this might also happen elsewhere. International service offerings exist for Canada UK and EU. We also sell in Canada with ShipBob. As of now, they only offer Canada Post for standard and FedEx for expedited shipping. Very expensive options. The app itself works properly for us, although it would be nice to have ShipBob update inventory within Shopify. Perhaps we just haven't found this functionality yet.

classification.summary: Existing satisfied customer praising the shipping solution they've used for over a year.

content.body: I really like how easy it is to use. The integration with shopify is seamless and it's super easy to import orders. Also, I like how it integrates with my stamps.com account so you can easily add more money as soon as you run out of shipping budget without leaving shipstation.com or disrupting the current order that you're, oftentimes, right in the middle of shipping. I also like how easy it is to process returns or exchanges and how it gives me the ability to email the customer with the return label automatically OR download the label so that I can send it as an attachment in a personal email to the customer's exchange or return request. Honestly, no negative feedback and would highly recommend it to any other CPG start-up.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipStation's ease of use, Shopify integration, and return/exchange management capabilities with no complaints.

content.body: After several years we are ending our relationship with Shipbob. They have overcharged us multiple times to the tune of thousands of dollars. Most recently, we submitted a work order to remove our few remaining items so we could close out our account. After paying for that work order, they "found" two cases of our most popular product of which we'd been sold out of for months. We relisted the item on our website and sold all but two units just in case there were any lost/damaged orders. We then submitted a disposal request for the warehouse to dispose of the two remaining 3.4 fl oz tubes of moisturizer so we could close our account. This should only cost a few dollars. Instead, Shipbob charged us $500 to dispose of two skincare products that fit in the palm of your hand. We raised the issue with Shipbob and weeks later we are still awaiting the refund...

classification.summary: Brand is ending their relationship with ShipBob due to chronic overcharging and poor customer service, including a $500 disposal fee dispute that remains unresolved.

content.body: We love this app. It has saved us so much time in doing our shipping. We love how quickly we can do shipping for all our orders in just a few clicks.

classification.summary: Customer is praising an app for streamlining their shipping process and saving time on order fulfillment.

content.body: I would highly recommend not using ShipMonk. I'm providing 2 stars because their UI is great, and the sync with Shopify is helpful so that we in theory don't have to update our inventory on a consistent basis (which in reality is not the case). If you have under 100 SKU's they may be a fit, we've been using them for a few years and everything was fine until we really starting scaling our inventory levels and SKU count. Then came receiving issues, lost inventory (and by default overselling to our customers and having to cancel orders), and sending the wrong product to our customers - as in not even inventory sold from our store (we sell dog merch, our customers have received human supplements, perfume, etc). I had to track down and reach out to the other stores separately to make sure they were aware their product (sometimes worth $100+) was being sent out to the wrong customers so they could also file claims. The lost inventory has been the biggest headache for us. When I say lost inventory I mean hundreds of units (some SKU's have a >6% shrink which ShipMonk claims is normal) that have gone missing within a few months, and no reimbursement with often what I would consider odd rational - they couldn't store everything in a single bin, therefore it's not their fault. Money drain! I will say different from other ShipMonk reviews I have mostly had good experiences with their CX team, and I think the bigger issue is that there are larger wide scale systemic issues with ShipMonk and the CX team is either not equipped to handle or they truly have no idea what happened and that's that. My negative experiences have been when agents will resolve a ticket when the issue is not fixed, so I've had to reopen tickets just to make sure they actually respond. Overall - I would keep shopping, not worth it.

classification.summary: A scaling ecommerce brand is actively looking to leave ShipMonk due to critical fulfillment failures including lost inventory (>6% shrink), wrong products shipped to customers, and poor system handling at higher SKU volumes.

author.name: Hook, Line & Tinker - modern embroidery kits
author.company: Hook, Line & Tinker - modern embroidery kits

content.body: I have been a Shipstation user for more than 2 years. When I switched my websites (I have different sites for wholesale and retail) over to Shopify last fall, the transition was seamless - even for my slightly less than simple setup. All my orders move into Shipstation from Shopify with one click. No manual order entry, and I have the flexibility to use my own commercial shipping discounts. Even my Etsy and Faire orders move readily into Shipstation. Easy peasy, and super fast.

classification.summary: A satisfied Shopify user praising Shipstation's seamless integration and order management capabilities across multiple sales channels.

content.body: i love it until it goes down or they do updates in the middle of working.for some reason i don't know why it does not pull down my shopify sales sales like it should. sometimes it does sometimes it doesn't. today shipstation pulled in a canceled sale from shopify, that was curious. other than my couple issues i love shipstation take a lot of work load off of me and helps me from making mistakes.

classification.summary: User appreciates ShipStation's core functionality but is frustrated with reliability issues including system downtime, inconsistent Shopify order syncing, and incorrect order pulling that creates extra work.

content.body: Their Monday morning outages are getting old. Happens way too often. Also, when you get customers, whose shipping labels show to have been paid for and printed, contacting you on a regular basis you will realize that you have to babysit this company's product. There are several threads on the Amazon Seller forum describing this exact issue, charging for shipping labels that aren't printed out. The latest glitch had occurred for over a week when using Shipstation Connect. Randomly printed out blank pages instead of Packing Slips. This seemed to occur when printing large batches. After waiting on their Chat for over an hour their poorly trained support person was zero help. Told us we should uninstall and reinstall the app & also tried to infer that it was our printer causing the problem. We have 2 printers and they both did the exact same skips. Another waste of time. We have found a workaround to avoid the missing packing slips. It takes more time but we can't continue having orders not shipped. Looking for a new option that isn't part of Shipstation or Stamps.com (the parent company). The fact that Shipstation took three weeks to respond to this clearly represents their approach to customer support.

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking to switch from ShipStation due to recurring system outages, printing failures, poor support response times, and lack of resolution to recurring issues.

content.body: We've been using shipstation for years! There are other shipping software options out there but Shipstation has never let us down. Great software, great company.

classification.summary: Customer expressing strong satisfaction with ShipStation shipping software after years of use, with no indication of dissatisfaction or need to switch.

content.body: Fantastic app. Is helping us break down the barriers when it comes to scaling an eCommerce business. Their Bulk shipping feature is a necessity for brands scaling around a hero product. Onboarding is incredibly easy and painless, our representative, Mike Azimi was a pleasure to work with and maybe one of the fastest communicators via email I've met.

classification.summary: Kong Beer Bong is a satisfied Saltbox customer praising the platform's ability to help scale their eCommerce business, particularly highlighting the bulk shipping feature and excellent onboarding experience.

content.body: This is perhaps among the best apps out there. We can't function without it. Not just the connections and level of service but how versatile it is. We can control our sales from our phone app, or desktop, and has all the platform connections we need.

classification.summary: Existing satisfied customer praising an app's versatility, connections, and service quality across multiple platforms and devices.

content.body: We absolutely love ShipStation! We have multiple shopify stores and Amazon accounts as well, the ability to sync it all into one software is a game changer! Highly recommended if you want to make shipping easy. ShipStation also has a deal with USPS to purchase postage at good rates as well. A+++++

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipStation's ability to centralize multiple sales channels and competitive shipping rates, not expressing any need for Saltbox services.

content.body: A serious lifesaver for managing all my shipments! I love that I can give my international customers a dynamic checkout which includes various shipping options and the option to pay for taxes and duties right at checkout. This really helps eliminate any surprises our international customers may be hit with on delivery and improves conversions at checkout. I also love that it works so seamlessly with our shipping carriers and that we are able to easily import our discounted rates we negotiated with carriers. To add to this, their customer service is A++++! I worked with Hiromi and she was so wonderful throughout the whole process. Anytime I had a question, it was answered within 30 minutes. She also took the time to video conference with me and walk me through the whole platform and help me set it up! Thank you thank you thank you!

classification.summary: Customer is praising their current shipping/fulfillment platform for international checkout capabilities, carrier integration, and excellent customer service.

content.body: I used this app to integrate our Shopify store with our Shipbob account to automise orders fulfillment. It works perfect!

classification.summary: Villa Cotton is satisfied with their ShipBob integration for Shopify order fulfillment automation.

content.body: I've been using shipstation for about 3 years. While works well, as you grow you see it's limitations quickly. I went from 3 shipments a day to 60 and I can honestly say, I'm not impressed. Lacking features: 1. doesn't automatically pick the lowest shipping rate if you have multiple courier accounts; 2. fails to pick up HS codes for international shipping; 3. may not pick up sale prices and country of origin for customs. Those are my 3 biggest pet peeves.

classification.summary: Growing ecommerce brand frustrated with ShipStation's limitations in automation, international shipping features, and ability to handle scaling from 3 to 60 daily shipments.

content.body: Don't even waste your time... I spent about 5 hours trying to get this app set up so I could offer calculated international shipping rates with duty quote during checkout. This included importing CSV file with all my product sizes and easyship classifications, adding all my shipping container sizes one-by-one and then paying over $800 for the annual subscription to Shopify as well as chatting with Shopify to manually turn on 3rd party calculated rates. After all that, I tried adding a couple items to the cart and checking out... it worked! But then, I tried adding a few more items and whenever I got over 10 items, the shipping calculation would say "Your cart has been updated and the items you added can't be shipped to your address. We don't offer shipping to United Kingdom" (or whatever country you might be testing) HUH?!? This is probably the worst wording imaginable. So I get a huge deal with a potential customer and they want to order 100 items and easyship tells them that we don't offer shipping to their country and I lose the customer for life?!? Who decided this was a good message? Sounds like a great way to lose business! I emailed easyship to see what is going on and didn't hear back... (In their defense, I did email on a Saturday morning, but I still hadn't heard anything at 4pm Monday). So, I opened live chat and spoke with someone who tells me that "this is a limitation of their software" and the only option is to use a Shopify flat rate shipping for larger orders. Who considers 10+ items too large of an order? So in other words, I just wasted about 5hrs of my life trying to use their app only to have it require me to go back to the way it was without the app. Again, don't waste your time with easyship... The name itself is false advertising :(

classification.summary: SimpliDock is frustrated with easyship's shipping calculation app due to software limitations that fail on orders over 10 items and poor customer support, forcing them back to basic flat-rate shipping.

content.body:
About a year ago I wanted to rent a private office and 1,000 sq ft of warehouse space in City of Industry. A friend of mine recommended me to contact Cube Work.

When I called it seemed like a call center, they just asked for my name and phone number and said someone would call me back (sort of weird). They didn't know pricing, availability...nothing.

A guy called me back and said they didn't have any private offices available (yet they had several locations at the time on their website). And then he told me that 1000 sq ft was a bit small for them to rent out.

What upset me was their website said that you could rent from 500 sq ft...So I'm not sure why he said 1000 sq ft was impossible to rent out.

He said he would check if there was any available at other locations and would call me back...but never called back.

I'm not impressed by them at all. I'm not sure what they are trying to do but for me it was a 2/5 star experience. It just seemed off. I loved the idea and concept of CubeWork.

classification.summary: Customer was frustrated with Cube Work's poor customer service, inconsistent information about minimum space requirements, and lack of follow-up when inquiring about private office and warehouse space.

metadata.address: 900 Turnbull Canyon Rd, City of Industry, CA 91745
metadata.owner_response: Hi Brian. I apologize for the miscommunication. Our goal is the total satisfaction of our customers. Would you mind sending an email with your contact information to info@cubework.com so we can address this and make things right for you?

content.body: We've been using Shipbob for a year now and the service has been excellent, the automation flawless and the integration scaled with our needs. We're very pleased to work with Shipbob and they've kept up with us every step of the way as we've scaled our store, order volume and inventory variety.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their fulfillment service's automation, integration capabilities, and ability to scale with their growing business.

content.body: The API works great, would like to have the weight of the shipment (actual vs dim), actual inventory. Also it would be nice if you when split a shipment that it updated both tracking numbers. Overall Shipbob is amazing, the above comments are all growing pains and I am guessing will be sorted out over time. Shipbob can handle the easiest to the most complex shipping issues!! Try them you will not be disappointed.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob user praising their service overall but requesting feature enhancements for shipment weight tracking, inventory visibility, and split shipment tracking number updates.

content.body: Works great. Self-serve platforms are the standard for modern 3PLs and ShipBob is at the top. They've scaled seamlessly with our volumes, that have grown significantly over the last 3 years.

classification.summary: Hero Cosmetics is satisfied with ShipBob's self-serve platform and ability to scale with their growing volumes over the past 3 years.

content.body: We've been working with Shipbob since 2018 and there are several reasons why Shipbob has been the perfect partner. First of all, speed to scale with us, pick-pack and ship with a business growing 1200% in a couple of weeks. Second of all, the locations across the US. We sells flammable goods that need to be shipped via ground, so Shipbob has been a great ally as they have 3pls all over the US facilitating 2-3 day delivery time for any customer in the US. Specially when weather challenges happen, being able to have different 3pls to ship from, allows you to ensure you seamless supply chain.Also their advanced software help us to quickly understand shipping costs and how to improve shipping times and costs by being closer to where your customer.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising ShipBob's multi-location network, speed, and software for handling rapid growth and optimizing shipping costs for flammable goods.

content.body: ShipBob is the best for 3rd party direct to consumer fulfillment. I've used them since our business's inception last year and they've always been eager to help us succeed. Their app is intuitive and user friendly and they've got all the options you'll ever need. They're growing fast too! Soon to have multiple centers in Europe!

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's fulfillment services and has no apparent need to switch providers.

content.body: We were originally really happy with their services, but the customer service has been very poor and they seem to be very unresponsive. They removed the chat option, and now emails take forever. Our recent tickets have not been resolved or answered properly. Very disappointed!

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with declining customer service responsiveness, removal of chat support, and slow email response times, though they haven't indicated they're actively switching yet.

content.body: This app is really very good in as much as they have chosen to scan and crosslink. Some missing information would be very helpful in feeding back from this API actual cost of shipping, the weight of the shipment (actual vs dim), actual inventory.

classification.summary: User appreciates the app's linking features but needs better API data on shipping costs, actual/dimensional weight, and real-time inventory information.

content.body: Switching warehouse management systems is a scary proposition. Especially when you have millions in the warehouse and are going right into the busiest season. After about 6 weeks we went from signing a contract to being live. And now after only 3 weeks on the platform we are already saving time and money.

classification.summary: Existing Saltbox customer praising the speed of implementation and immediate cost/time savings after switching their warehouse management system.

content.body: LOVE ShipBob. We work on the ShipBob dashboard daily, and wouldn't change a thing. Everything from fulfillment to delivery is a breeze!

classification.summary: Bloom Nutrition is highly satisfied with ShipBob's fulfillment and dashboard experience and has no intention to switch.

content.body: Great fulfillment and customer service! ShipBob is always improving the experience and looking for ways to help their clients.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's fulfillment service and customer service improvements, indicating satisfaction with their current 3PL provider.

content.body: We really enjoy working with the ShipBob dashboard on a daily basis. For our customer service team, it's a simple way to keep track of the stage of every package (from picking, to shipping, to delivery), and to provide these details to our customers when necessary. ShipBob has also made it super simple for us to be able to file claims with carriers when we've had issues with them, and we love their carriers estimated shipping time tool (especially during peak time season). Their dashboard is easy to understand and makes changes and edits to orders simple. We've also loved working with their team, both with our team lead as well as with every customer service rep we've spoken to on the phone. Through their dashboard and analytics, we've also been able to analyze our inventory and distribution of it to our different warehouses. Overall, would highly recommend.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their dashboard, carrier management, and customer service without indicating any need to switch providers.

content.body: We have been using ShipBob for more than 1 year now and we are absolutely happy with their services. The dashboard is easy to use, everything automated so you can do other work while they are taking care of our order's fulfillment, and moreover, their support is just amazing! They are very responsive and resolve the problems as soon as you request.Their pricing is decent and it is so easy to use. I am not a tech person at all, and if I can use it, everyone can use it :) I highly recommend ShipBob!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is praising their fulfillment services, ease of use, and support quality with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: We've used ShipBob ever since we launched 3 years ago and we couldn't be happier with our partnership. Their analytics dashboard is fascinating and user-friendly to pull data, track shipments, and track inventory. Our products have shipped to over 40 countries and ShipBob has had no issue. ShipBob is not just a 3PL, they are a true partner. They also do a good job of seeing areas of improvement for my company. They’ve introduced me to 4–5 companies that they think could be beneficial in specific areas, such as marketing or online reviews. You can’t really put a price on people I never would’ve met if it weren’t for having a good partnership with ShipBob. ShipBob does a good job of treating every brand they work with as a brand of their own. They’re like a large portfolio overseeing the development of different brands, and you can tell that they’re people you can trust. They’re not just throwing my products in poly mailers and sending them out; they’re a much more in-depth company.

classification.summary: Satisfied ShipBob customer praising their 3PL partnership, analytics capabilities, global shipping reach, and consultative business approach.

content.body: This app is so easy to use. It does all the work in the background. Orders are automatically added from Shopify to ShipStation...NO double entry of orders needed! We have it connected to our USPS/UPS/FedEx accounts and for $9 a month, this is one of the best decisions you can make. ShipStation also creates a packing slip which we include with all the orders for a customer receipt.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's automation capabilities and affordable pricing for order management and fulfillment.

content.body: We have used Shipbob for the past 4 months after migrating from a more antiquated fulfillment organization. We evaluated 5 fulfillment organizations prior to choosing Shipbob. There are 3 major reasons we chose Shipbob. First, Shipbob gave us the ability to analyze how to distribute our product across multiple warehouses in different parts of the US. Currently, we use 2 locations and are debating with Shipbob about moving our products into a 3rd location. The primary advantage of multiple locations has been reduced shipping cost, however with the winter storms and COVID we have also been able to fulfill out of an alternative location when one of the locations has been offline. This process has been automated and seamless which has saved us from a major customer satisfaction issue. The second reason we chose Shipbob is that they are truly partnering with us. They have made recommendations (location, box size, etc..) to help us reduce costs. Their pricing transparency and reporting is excellent and has helped us close our monthly reporting days earlier than with our prior fulfillment vendor. Lastly, we chose Shipbob because of its ease of integration and Dashboard. Everything from setting it up to running your shipping, changing addresses, chasing down customer sat issues etc... is available to us in an easy to use, intuitive, user friendly dashboard. Ultimately, we are very pleased with our decision to partner with Shipbob.

classification.summary: Skinesa is a satisfied ShipBob customer praising their multi-location fulfillment network, cost optimization, partnership approach, and user-friendly dashboard, with plans to expand to a third warehouse location.

content.body: Using ShipBob for almost two years now. Seamless Shopify integration. Orders go directly to the ShipBob dashboard and are marked 'fulfilled' in Shopify once they're ready. We will keep working with ShipBob. They keep improving to continuously get even better. Really recommend using ShipBob.

classification.summary: Jimmy Joy USA is a satisfied ShipBob customer praising their Shopify integration and service quality with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: This is super easy and the customer service has been fantastic. We've been a long time customer of Shipbob and despite growing very fast they've kept up extremely well and have been great to work with.

classification.summary: Satisfied long-time ShipBob customer praising their service quality and ability to scale with growing demand.

content.body: ShipBob is the 3rd fulfillment partner that we've migrated to in 4 years of growing our operations. Compared to what we've used in the past (plus about half a dozen options we only reviewed, but never used), they're really putting the users first. They're not just a logistics/freight company offering ecom fulfillment - they really give us the tools and options we need for our business. Whether it's inventory insights, custom packaging and marketing inserts, analytics and exports, or helping us optimize our pricing by figuring out which of their warehouses to use, it's really, really nice to have a fulfillment partner like ShipBob on our side.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praises their fulfillment partner's tools, analytics, and customization options after switching from multiple previous providers.

content.body: The integration works smoothly & whenever we've needed customer service, Shipbob has been speedy in responding.

classification.summary: Barefoot Scientist is satisfied with ShipBob's smooth integration and responsive customer service.

content.body: As far as 3pls go, Shipbob is the best I've worked with! In my personal opinion, more than cheap shipping rates and automatic fulfillment, having insight into exactly what's happening at the warehouse level is my top priority. Shipbob makes this possible with their software-- absolutely unparalleled. It provides full transparency into each stage of the pick & pack process and when there are issues (impossible to avoid in logistics), our Merchant Success Manager is just an email, phone call, or text away as well as support which is pretty responsive to my requests. I'm physically 10 timezones removed from where we ship from so that's super helpful. Shipbob's claim/reimbursement policy for lost or damages parcels is super fair, whereas other 3PLs I've worked with can leave you with huge bills, missing stock, and no way to find out why or where your products are. I love shipbob!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's warehouse visibility, software transparency, and responsive support while contrasting it with poor experiences from other 3PLs.

content.body: ShipBob's app integrates very well with Shopify and allows our order flow to automatically (*there is a slight sync delay*) appear in ShipBob's order management software. From there, the orders are picked, packed and shipped. This automated integration is key to any small business that needs their 3PL to do the heavy lifting! ShipBob is a massive player in the 3PL space and you should definitely give them a look to see if they can satisfy your needs and the needs of your customer.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer recommends their 3PL service for its strong Shopify integration and automated order management capabilities.

content.body: I had few issues with a carrier but easyship got back to me and solved the problem, their customer services has definitely improved

classification.summary: Customer had carrier issues resolved by easyship and notes their customer service has improved.

content.body: This app integrates seamlessly with our Shopify fulfillment setup. Works perfectly. Set it and forget it.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's seamless Shopify integration and reliable fulfillment automation.

content.body: ShipBob has completely transformed our business. We've grown drastically over the last few years and that would not have been possible without ShipBob. Our customer experience is up, shipping timelines are quick, and the seamless syncing between ShipBob and Shopify keeps everything running efficiently.

classification.summary: Satisfied ShipBob customer praising the platform's impact on business growth, customer experience, and operational efficiency.

content.body: Really simple to use and navigate around. Quick and responsive, an easy way to see a summary of your business and key action areas

classification.summary: Customer praising the ease of use and responsiveness of a platform for viewing business summaries and identifying action items.

content.body: The Shipbob app and warehouses have made our lives so much easier. The seem less integration allows us to focus on growing our business. The ability to use all their warehouse across the world allows us to provide 2-day shipping!!!

Also, their analytics dashboard allows us to have all the data we need to run our business more efficiently. Highly recommended!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's Shopify integration, fulfillment network, cost reduction, speed, and analytics capabilities.

content.body: This is my primary shipping application - the features are good, but there seems to be an issue approximately 1 in 15 to 20 times you go to use it. Most of the issues stem from Shipstation Connect as I use a mac. I've spoken to them and they agreed this app is problematic. It works, just not all of the time and needs to be reconnected frequently. The service is powerful, but you need to be patient and it's difficult to count on.

classification.summary: User relies on Shipstation for shipping but experiences frequent connectivity issues and unreliability, particularly with the Mac version, requiring frequent reconnections.

content.body: Thanks to this app, I was able to go global, and I succeeded!! I now sell my product internationally. Every day customers are buying from all over the world. The parcels go every day very far from my place without any problem and with total ease. Merely the best shipping service I have ever had. Come on, an all-in-one solution that gives to your customer: Price of transportTransport time Customs fees And this in every country of the world.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer praising their shipping app's global capabilities and all-in-one solution for international order fulfillment.

content.body: Late December I contact 3 warehouse manager software Ship Hero, SKU Vault, and Finale Inventory. I spent 15 hours meeting with the 3 companies and meeting with 2 3PL one worked with Ship Hero the other with Sku Vault. By far Ship Hero is the best option for Shopify merchants. It's almost like it was build for it. We had to leave the 3PL that we were using within weeks and setup a 4000sq. warehouse. Reasons for leaving:1. 3PL had 1.5%-3% order error in peak months. 2. picker and packer were not efficient.3. Inventory was never correct.4. Shipping Amazon orders took too long5. No API integration with Shopify Plus. The solution: Ship Hero1. Error margin 0.01%2. picker and packer positions cut in half3. inventory is accurate 99%4. Integration with Amazon5. Ship Hero and Shopify Plus connect in minutes. If it wasn't for Ship Hero and Yosef Haas we wouldn't have been able to setup a warehouse in weeks. They advised us in all purchases from Racks to Scanners.During the learning phase (3 weeks) we meet with Ship Hero almost everyday. Onboarding team is extremely knowledgable and responsive. They don't let you struggle through setup mode which is already hard as it is. I couldn't be any happier or more satisfied with their software. Thanks Yosef PS. If Ship Hero didn't exist I would never want to own a warehouse.

classification.summary: A satisfied Shopify merchant shares their positive experience switching from a problematic 3PL to an in-house warehouse powered by Ship Hero software, highlighting improvements in order accuracy, efficiency, and system integration.

content.body: We have been working with the Easyship team for a number of months to launch serviecs with them in the USA. The app worked perfectly and the level of support we received from the Easyship team was and is first class.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Easyship's app and support services after launching USA operations with them.

content.body: This app has absolutely changed our business. I Heart Wall Art ship lots of big and bulky items from our workshop outside a major city and it's always been a nightmare to try and find good courier rates. We're getting the best details we've ever had now, and have found the system easy to use and incorporate into our business.

classification.summary: An Australian ecommerce brand is praising their current shipping/fulfillment solution for resolving their previous challenges with courier rates and service details for bulky items.

content.body: Shiphero is perfect. Everything works as it should and it is helping us scale and handle order volume seamlessly. If you're looking to outsource your shipping, look no further. Shiphero is the one.

classification.summary: NooWave is satisfied with Shiphero's fulfillment services and recommends it for scaling order volume.

content.body: What a fantastic company. Not only are they effective and efficient, but their customer service is superb. Really helped us out on a personal level with our business on top of doing an excellent job at fulfillment.

classification.summary: Existing Saltbox customer praising the company's fulfillment efficiency, customer service, and personal business support.

content.body: As a brand that has been used to using Amazon FBA, the thought of handling international shipping from our Shopify store was admittedly daunting. Easyship has made the transition straight forward. We have connected with their partnered 3PLs in Hong Kong and the US who have also been great to work with. Being able to sync orders from Shopify to our 3PLs via Easyship has saved a lot of time. Especially since we don't have to prepare any shipping documents. The onboarding process and customer support has also been great so far.

classification.summary: Tawbury transitioned from Amazon FBA to using Easyship for international fulfillment via Shopify-connected 3PLs and is satisfied with the streamlined process and support.

content.body: If I could give more, they'll get more...to make up for these 1-star toxic reviews. Be reasonable people. The setup can take some time as with many TP services/plugins, but the team at Easyship are extremely friendly and will go out of their way to help you if you're nice and easy to deal with too. I'd recommend setting up a demo phone call, keep a good relationship (as you should with business), and you'll have a seamless experience. They offer some serious analytical tools for an extra, But the basic free package is good enough. Good courier pricing as well. Personally, I've dealt with much third-party software, and the two account managers, Michelle and Shivanjali were top-notch. 10 out of 10. Definitely ask for their help if you're based in the States or APAC. Cheers guys, keep up the good work. Look forward to any new features. -Cal

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer is defending the service against negative reviews and praising their account managers and overall experience.

content.body: My company was one of the few that moved in to this ReadySpaces warehouse facility when it first opened in 2020. This facility is easily accessible from 280 and it's located less than 1/2 block away from the Spartan stadium along Alma. I needed a warehouse for my company's inventory and was glad that I found this place in the South Bay Area. Outside, there are ample of parking spaces. Inside, there are different sizes of warehousing square footage that I could choose to meet my company's needs. I like this place because I could scale up or down when my company's situation changes. There's also a co-working area with conference room that I could use when meeting with my clients. During my first shipment from overseas, the warehouse manager, Mike Bauer went above and beyond and helped me to unload the cargo with his forklift from the container. So, big shout-out to Mike, thank you!
